scripts.test: c8 --clean=true --silent --include scripts/render-report.js --include scripts/mermaid-render.js node tests/test-render-report.js && c8 --clean=false --check-coverage --lines 80 --per-file --reporter=text-summary --include scripts/render-report.js --include scripts/mermaid-render.js node tests/test-mermaid-render.js && node tests/test-cross-deck-consistency.js && node scripts/verify-report-runtime.js --self-test
